clause_text: The tenant shall pay rent on the first day of each month.
If payment is more than five days late, the landlord may charge a reasonable late fee as allowed by law.
weak_label_reason: type=payment: payment, fee, charge, late fee; risk_type=financial_penalty: late fee, charge; risk_level=medium: late fee, charge

clause_text: The landlord must provide written notice before entering the rental property except in an emergency.
The tenant must keep all security codes and building access information confidential.
weak_label_reason: type=confidentiality: confidential; risk_type=confidentiality: confidential; risk_level=medium: confidential

clause_text: Either party may terminate this agreement after a material breach and written notice.
weak_label_reason: type=termination: terminate, breach; risk_type=termination: terminate, breach; risk_level=medium: terminate, breach

clause_text: The landlord shall not be liable for indirect or consequential damages except where prohibited by law.
weak_label_reason: type=liability: liable, damages; risk_type=liability_limitation: not be liable, consequential damages; risk_level=high: not be liable, consequential damages

clause_text: The tenant must keep the rental property clean and avoid causing damage.
